---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for PG Patrol
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Explain the problem this feature would solve or the scenario where it would be useful.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
